quote.issuer_name: Shenzhen HQVT Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.nm: Shenzhen HQVT Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.summary: Shenzhen HQVT Technology Co Ltd is a China-based company primarily engaged in providing multispectral artificial intelligence (AI) products and services. The Company’s products and services primarily include multispectral AI modules, multispectral AI perception terminals, and multispectral AI large model services. The Company's solutions are used in smart cities, smart campus management, internet data center security optimization, industrial and commercial security, and Internet of Things (IoT) facility management and other fields. The Company is also engaged in the research, development and production of other AI vision modules, as well as providing subscription and maintenance services. The Company operates its businesses in the domestic and overseas markets.
